feedback.text: Digital Fairness Act is a great idea but it would be even better if it could also be clarified more in regards to videogames. Ideally the act would prohibit companies from revoking someone's game that they bought, mandating that the owners of a copy of a game can keep it on their computer forever in a functional state (forbidding intentional 'bricking' of a game and allowing people to create their own multiplayer server)
